{{Quote|Well, well, well! My name's ''Brunok,'' cutie, an' I got a few minutes 'fore I hafta report to the shuttle pad—so, whatsay we go someplace and get real ''tired'' real fast?|Brunok, upon meeting Leia Organa|<ref name="marvel51" />}}
'''Brunok''' was a construction worker who was part of a crew on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] superweapon known as the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. While on the planet [[Hockaleg]], he and [[Unidentified Tarkin construction crewman|another crew member]] were subdued by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The Rebels took the workers' uniforms so they could infiltrate the ''Tarkin'' as part of a construction crew.<ref name="marvel51" />
